notes: Scope is the patient-derived HNSCC tumoroid (section 2.9); extraction correctly captured source_cells (primary_tissue), matrix name (Cultrex UltiMatrix RGF BME), and 11/13 signaling factors with correct doses (Y-27632 10 µM, Capsofungin 0.5 µg/mL, B27 1×, NAC 1.25 mM, Nicotinamide 10 mM, EGF 50 ng/mL, FGF10 10 ng/mL, FGF2 5 ng/mL, PGE2 1 µM, Forskolin 1 µM, RSPO3-Fc 4%, Noggin-Fc 4%). All extracted doses verified verbatim against source; no fabricated values. Two true factor recall misses: A83-01 (500 nM) and CHIR99021 (0.3 µM) — both standard organoid-medium small molecules listed mid-cocktail. Matrix percent (70%) and the treatment timeline (7 days to treatment, +10 days) were also missed, and base_media should read 'advanced DMEM/F12'. GlutaMax supplement omitted. No tables in bundle (tables=[]) and no figure images on disk, so no multimodal recall sources beyond text. Misclassified organoid_type 'other' (source is a tumoroid/tumor model) but source_cells/matrix correct.
